title: Personalised Christening Stickers For Boys Blue Party Sweet Cone Bag Label Teddy Bear Polka Dot (24 Stickers (45mm diameter))
features: A4 Sheet of Personalised Self Adhesive Pre Cut Stickers, Just Peel & Stick
Stickers can be personalised with any wording space permitting. Each sticker will be printed with the same wording, so if you require than one lot of wording please purchase another sheet.

HOW TO PERSONALISE: Click the yellow customize now button, enter your personalisation details then add to basket and checkout. Alternatively please let us know the details via the "Contact Seller" option on Amazon.
description: Our Christening Day stickers are perfect for personalising your own party favour bags. Thank your guests using these cute stickers, ideal for sticking on favours, envelopes or sweet cone bags. White Self Adhesive Stickers All text can be changed to the message of your choice space permitting Text colour can be changed on request please leave details in the notes section Stickers are printed onto an A4 sheet of pre cut self adhesive stickers, just peel and stick Please note black outline will not print, this is just to show the shape of the stickers All stickers will be identical Printed output may differ slightly to screen colour Label Sizes 02 Stickers Per A4 Sheet 140mm diameter 06 Stickers Per A4 Sheet 88mm diameter 15 Stickers Per A4 Sheet 51mm diameter 24 Stickers Per A4 Sheet 45mm diameter 35 Stickers Per A4 Sheet 37mm diameter
